summary: Completed comprehensive testing of redesigned login and signup pages with split-screen 'Electric Academia' theme. All major features working excellently with beautiful UI implementation.

design_issues.issue: Submit button not disabled when required fields are empty (may be intentional design choice)

passed_tests: Login page loads at /login with beautiful split-screen layout (gradient left, form right)
Login form has email input with envelope icon and password input with lock icon
Password visibility toggle works perfectly on login page
Remember me checkbox present and functional
Login submit button says 'Sign in' with arrow icon
Login form validation shows errors for empty fields and invalid email format
Navigation from login to signup works via 'Create one' link
Signup page loads at /signup with split-screen layout matching theme
Signup role selection works (Customer/Organiser buttons with visual feedback)
Signup form has all required fields: name (user icon), email (envelope), password (lock), confirm password (shield icon)
Password strength indicator displays 3 bars and text ('Weak', 'Good', 'Strong') as user types
Confirm password shows 'Passwords match' with green checkmark when passwords match
Navigation from signup to login works via 'Sign in' link
TCD Tickets branding and logos display correctly on left panels of both pages
Left panels show inspiring content: campus image on login, feature list on signup
Form inputs have proper icons and smooth hover/focus transitions
Landing page at root / still loads and works correctly
Navigation from landing page to login and signup pages works via navbar buttons
Mobile responsiveness maintained with proper logo placement
Animated gradient background with floating blobs works on both pages
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
